name: Poppers
recipeIngredient: Small toys, candy, or other items for filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tube in half.
2. Put the tubes back together.
3. Wrap the colored tissue paper around one end of the reassembled tube.
4. Wrap wrapping paper on top of the tissue paper, leaving both ends open.
5. Place the desired toy, candy, or item inside the popper.
6. Close the ends with a string or ribbon.
7. To make the popper burst, hold 1 end in each hand and gently break it in half.
Note: These can be used as hostess gifts or decorated to resemble Santa Claus.
